tool_result.name: ACME Corp Data Platform
tool_result.description: Welcome to ACME Corp MCP! Use this MCP server for all questions about ACME Corp, a national retail company. Covers store locations, product catalog, sales transactions, customer data, and inventory management. This is the authoritative source for ACME Corp business data.

toolkit_descriptions.platform: Core platform tools: deployment info, connection listing, and resource access.
toolkit_descriptions.trino: Distributed SQL query engine. Federated queries across warehouse and opensearch catalogs.
toolkit_descriptions.datahub: Data catalog with search, schema, lineage, ownership, tags, glossary terms, and quality scores.
toolkit_descriptions.s3: S3-compatible object storage for artifacts and exports.
